refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-FRs for each phase allows targeted design parameters and implementation modules to optimize each phase, improving clarity and traceability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.
sub_frs: Minimize load phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

candidate_dps: Optimize hydraulic and mechanical actuation for load phase
Optimize vehicle propulsion and routing for travel phase
Optimize dumping mechanism and sequencing for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize hydraulic and mechanical actuation for load phase

potential_sources: Load phase actuation tightly coupled with vehicle mechanical systems
Travel phase propulsion and routing logically separate
coupling_check.notes: Selected DP focuses on load phase optimization, which can be modularized with minimal cross-phase coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes load phase optimization can be isolated without degrading travel or dump phases
Risk that mechanical constraints limit achievable cycle time improvements
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider iterative refinement of travel and dump phase DPs in subsequent decomposition levels.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components responsible for hydraulic and mechanical actuation during load phase

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send load phase status and performance data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive load phase commands from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary containment for load phase actuation DP
Interface for remote commands, no direct actuation
Monitors safety, no direct involvement in load phase actuation

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Load phase actuation DP is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and maximize control over mechanical systems.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry
Risk of insufficient coordination with Safety Services for safety-critical operations
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enhance interface definitions and safety integration in next iteration.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-FRs; selected DP logically addresses load phase optimization with minimal coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists in coordination interfaces with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment score for load phase DP, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and tasking command logs is feasible.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of load phase DP to Vehicle module is clear and aligns with physical actuation responsibilities.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface protocols between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry.
Integrate safety alert mechanisms with Safety Services module for load phase operations.

decision.justification: While the current level decomposition and assignments are sound, further decomposition of travel and dump phases is needed to fully address the cycle time KPI and ensure comprehensive coverage.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

revise.why: To decompose remaining cycle phases for targeted DP and IM assignments.

assumptions: Load phase optimization can be modularized within Vehicle module.
Interfaces with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation are sufficient for coordination.
open_risks: Interface complexity and diffusion risks with coordination modules.
Safety integration for high criticality load phase operations.
evidence_needed: Performance data validating load phase cycle time improvements.
Interface test results for tasking and telemetry communication.
Safety compliance verification for load phase actuation.
